title:

content:
## All the post codes on Newzealand updated database
We are looking for the database of all post codes across newzealand with cities and region for my website to integrate shipping charges according to postcodes. we are looking for excel format file.
We are looking for the database of all post codes across newzealand with cities and region for my website to integrate shipping charges according to postcodes. we are looking for excel format file.
